item.backpack_logistics.auto_unpacker_up: Watches for Create packages addressed to you (or a custom address) and automatically unpacks them into the backpack.
item.backpack_logistics.stock_caller_upg:
Keeps one item stocked in the backpack by requesting deliveries from a linked logistics network, and unpacks arriving packages automatically.
Right click a Stock Link or Stock Ticker to link.
Sneak right click in the air to unlink.
item.backpack_logistics.advanced_stock_c:
Keeps up to nine items stocked in the backpack by requesting deliveries from a linked logistics network, and unpacks arriving packages automatically.
Right click a Stock Link or Stock Ticker to link.
Sneak right click in the air to unlink.
item.backpack_logistics.sender_upgrade.t:
Sends one item type above a set threshold from the backpack to a named Bee Port via Robo Bee.
Right click a Stock Link or Stock Ticker to link.
Sneak right click in the air to unlink.
item.backpack_logistics.advanced_sender_:
Sends up to nine item types above a set threshold from the backpack to a named Bee Port via Robo Bee.
Right click a Stock Link or Stock Ticker to link.
Sneak right click in the air to unlink.
item.backpack_logistics.linked_upgrade.t: Not linked - right click a Stock Link or Stock Ticker
gui.backpack_logistics.upgrades.stock_ca: When stock of a filtered item drops below this amount, a call is placed
Each call orders enough items to reach this amount
gui.backpack_logistics.upgrades.sender.u: Sending starts once stock of a filtered item rises above this amount
gui.backpack_logistics.upgrades.sender.l: Sending stops once stock is back down to this amount
gui.backpack_logistics.number_selector.c: Left click +, right click -, scroll to adjust. Shift x8, Ctrl x64
info.backpack_logistics.auto_unpacker: Insert into a Sophisticated Backpack. Watches for Create packages addressed to you (your name, or anything@YourName) in your inventory and the backpack, and unpacks them straight into the backpack. Contents follow the backpack's insert rules; anything that does not fit stays boxed. The settings tab has an optional extra address filter (supports * globs) which also works while the backpack is placed as a block.
info.backpack_logistics.stock_caller: Right-click a Stock Ticker or Stock Link to tune the upgrade to that logistics network, then insert it into a Sophisticated Backpack. Set the item to keep stocked and the stock range: when the count drops below 'Call below', enough is ordered to reach 'Fill to'. Carried, deliveries arrive by Robo Bee addressed to you; placed as a block, set a delivery address and a matching Bee Port next to the backpack will push deliveries into it. Arriving packages are unpacked automatically.
info.backpack_logistics.advanced_stock_c: Works like the Stock Caller Upgrade but tracks up to nine different items. Right-click a Stock Ticker or Stock Link to tune it to a network, insert into a backpack, then configure the filter and the 'Call below' / 'Fill to' stock range in its settings tab. Arriving packages are unpacked into the backpack automatically.
info.backpack_logistics.sender: Right-click a Stock Ticker or Stock Link to tune the upgrade to that logistics network, then insert it into a Sophisticated Backpack. Pick an item to watch: when the count rises above 'Send above', the excess is sent away until only 'Keep' remains. Carried, a Robo Bee collects the package from you; placed as a block, the addressed package is left in the backpack for an adjacent Bee Port to pull. Deliveries go to the Bee Port whose address filter matches.
info.backpack_logistics.advanced_sender: Works like the Sender Upgrade but watches up to nine different items. Excess above 'Send above' is trimmed down to 'Keep' and delivered to the Bee Port whose address matches the configured one.
Robo Bees from a Bee Port deliver packages addressed to you straight into your inventory
With an Auto-Unpacker Upgrade in your backpack, arriving packages are unboxed directly into it
Contents follow the backpack's usual insert rules - whatever does not fit stays boxed up
The upgrade tab has an extra address filter: packages sent to that address are claimed too, even while the backpack is placed as a block
backpack_logistics.ponder.stock_caller.t: Right-click any Stock Ticker or Stock Link with the Stock Caller Upgrade to link it to that logistics network
Insert the upgrade into a backpack and pick the items to keep stocked - the advanced version tracks up to nine
'Call below' and 'Fill to' set the stock range: dropping under the lower bound orders enough to reach the upper bound
When stock runs low, packagers on the network pack the missing items, addressed to you
A Bee Port with a Robo Bee then flies the package to you - the Stock Caller unboxes it into the backpack automatically
backpack_logistics.ponder.sender.text_1: Link the Sender Upgrade to a logistics network by right-clicking a Stock Ticker or Stock Link
backpack_logistics.ponder.sender.text_2: Pick the items to watch: rising above 'Send above' ships the excess away until only the 'Keep' amount remains
backpack_logistics.ponder.sender.text_3: Enter the address of a Bee Port; a Robo Bee will fly to you and collect the excess as a package
backpack_logistics.ponder.sender.text_4: The bee delivers it to the Bee Port whose address filter matches, which pushes the items into adjacent inventories
message.backpack_logistics.update_instal: [Backpack Logistics] Update %s downloaded - it will take effect on the next server restart.
message.backpack_logistics.update_staged: [Backpack Logistics] Update %s was downloaded but the old jar could not be replaced automatically - finish the swap in the mods folder manually.
message.backpack_logistics.update_failed: [Backpack Logistics] Update %s could not be installed - see the log for details.
message.backpack_logistics.client_update: [Backpack Logistics] Version %s received from the server - restart your game to apply it.
message.backpack_logistics.server_missin: [Backpack Logistics] This server does not have Create: Backpack Logistics installed - its upgrades, items and recipes will be unavailable until it is added to the server's mods folder.
message.backpack_logistics.client_missin: [Backpack Logistics] Your client does not have Create: Backpack Logistics installed - backpack upgrade settings tabs will not be usable. Install the mod on your client for the full experience.
